posts.author: V_Szabi (Szabolcs Vincze)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Community,

I am a Monday Channel Partner.

The agency I am at is wroking on an enterprise level Monday solution for one of our customers. I am using Extract to get files into columns from emailed item updates.

I attach pictures of the items created from emails with the same 4 attachments. When the items stay on the board where Extract puts their attachments from item updates to columns, it works fine.

image1286×384 35.9 KB

When an automation changes their statuses and moves them with the exact same attachments to another board, some files get duplicated.

image1271×482 8.84 KB

image1218×426 77 KB

How could you stabilize the platform so that only the original 4 files are copied into the Files column?

Here you can see a video replicating the error.
https://we.tl/t-P70FfqFkh0

Best,
Szabi
